raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX - XXXX reported a fraudulent charge from a XXXX clothing company. Barclays investigated it and denied my claim. Barclays did not request any information from me on the matter. 
I also reached out to the clothing company to investigate this matter. We aligned that my account was hacked and they opened an investigation on their side. 
XXXX - XXXX reopened the case again as it is a charge on my card made without my permission. Barclays again did not request any information from me regarding the fraud charge. 
XXXX - Barclay denied my XXXX claim for fraud. I called and questioned why and they stated they had evidence from the clothing company that the charge was legit. I requested they send me this information. When I asked them why they hadnt requested evidence from my side they said they will give me their fax information. I stated no one has a fax machine anymore and then they said theyd send me a letter to respond to with my evidence via mail, and that they wouldnt accept any evidence via email or internet. They also said I should take up this matter with the clothing company, I told them I did and the clothing company insists I take the matter up with my credit card company. I have gone back and forth with the credit card company many times and it is a useless circle of the same communication with XXXX help.
